message:
test(doom): add 14 player tests and 23 geometry tests

Player: thrust math, strafe perpendicularity, forward/backward,
yaw wrapping, pitch clamping, bob offset, spawn reset, running multiplier.
Geometry: point_on_line_side, point_to_segment_dist edge cases,
line intersection endpoints, normalize_angle, angle_diff wrapping,
circle_intersects_segment hit/miss/tangent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
